title: Jinchu-Maru katana
description: CIT resource pack that adds the Cyberpunk 2077 katana to Minecraft!
body:
# **Jinchu-Maru katana** ![Jinchu-Maru](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gGsrAwH8/images/a5acdafcaa7c7ec8a6a19b096ca42b46133abf6b.png) **To obtain it, rename any sword on the anvil "```Jinchu-Maru```". Works with Optifine or modification "[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)" (Fabric)** ### !!!Attention, this model is included in [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cyberpack)!!! ![katana in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gGsrAwH8/images/b12807828804d4bc011c4598d949065a0c1db436.png) ![First-person view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gGsrAwH8/images/61ee9932bcbbf4e0266840dd5f6276ba818977c3.png) ![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gGsrAwH8/images/5a410872ecb53084fa55583799ca69d90e6f4012.png) # **Social**

# **Support the project**
